title: IssuerEntity
description: An organisation or authority that issues credentials. Separate from Trust Anchors (cryptographic roots). An issuer may be backed by one or more trust anchors. Supports full lifecycle: accreditation, suspension, and revocation.

organization_id.description: null = global/system issuer (auto-visible to all organisations)

issuer_id.description: Unique issuer identifier: DID, domain, X.509 subject DN, or custom ID

issuer_type.description: ORGANIZATION: enterprise issuer. GOVERNMENT: state/national authority. DEVICE: device-bound credential issuer.

is_system_issuer.description: true = automatically visible to all organisations (e.g. ICAO-enrolled states, AAMVA issuers)

compliance_status.description: ACCREDITED: formally certified by an accreditation body. COMPLIANT: meets required standards. SUSPENDED: temporarily inactive (reversible). REVOKED: permanently invalidated.

trust_anchor_id.description: Optional link to a trust anchor (for X.509 chain-backed issuers)
